title: QIAprep Spin Miniprep (plasmid DNA)
description: QIAGEN QIAprep Spin Miniprep Kit (#27104): kit buffers and spin columns plus the microcentrifuge protocol for purifying plasmid DNA from E. coli.

payload.body:
## Purpose

Purify up to ~20 ug of high-copy plasmid DNA from 1-5 mL of an overnight E. coli culture by alkaline lysis followed by silica-membrane spin-column binding, washing, and elution.

## Kit components

QIAGEN QIAprep Spin Miniprep Kit, #27104 (50 preps):

| Component | Role |
| --- | --- |
| Buffer P1 (resuspension, add RNase A, store at 4 C) | Resuspends the cell pellet |
| Buffer P2 (lysis) | Alkaline SDS lysis of cells |
| Buffer N3 (neutralization) | Neutralizes and precipitates debris and genomic DNA |
| Buffer PB (binding/wash) | Removes trace nuclease and carbohydrate (optional wash) |
| Buffer PE (wash, add ethanol before use) | Salt wash to remove contaminants |
| Buffer EB (elution, 10 mM Tris-Cl pH 8.5) | Elutes purified plasmid |
| QIAprep Spin Columns | Silica membrane that binds plasmid DNA |
| LyseBlue reagent (optional) | pH/mixing indicator added to Buffer P1 |

Supply your own 1.5 mL collection tubes and a benchtop microcentrifuge.

## Steps (microcentrifuge protocol)

1. Pellet 1-5 mL of overnight culture. Resuspend the pellet in 250 uL Buffer P1 and transfer to a microcentrifuge tube; no cell clumps should remain.
2. Add 250 uL Buffer P2 and mix by inverting 4-6 times until the solution is clear. Do not let lysis proceed more than 5 min.
3. Add 350 uL Buffer N3 and mix immediately by inverting 4-6 times.
4. Centrifuge 10 min at 13,000 rpm (~17,900 x g).
5. Apply the supernatant to a QIAprep spin column. Centrifuge 30-60 sec and discard the flow-through.
6. (Optional) Wash with 0.5 mL Buffer PB, centrifuge 30-60 sec, discard flow-through.
7. Wash with 0.75 mL Buffer PE, centrifuge 30-60 sec, discard flow-through.
8. Centrifuge 1 more min to remove residual wash buffer (ethanol carryover otherwise inhibits downstream reactions).
9. Place the column in a clean 1.5 mL tube. Add 50 uL Buffer EB (or water) to the center of the membrane, let stand 1 min, and centrifuge 1 min to elute.

## Expected result

Purified plasmid DNA in 50 uL, suitable for sequencing, restriction digest, cloning, or transfection. Quantify by Qubit or A260.

## Notes

- Add the supplied RNase A to Buffer P1 and ethanol to Buffer PE before first use; check both off on the bottle.
- For higher yield or A260/A280 readings, warm Buffer EB to 50-70 C before elution and let it stand on the membrane longer.
- Source (official): QIAprep Miniprep Handbook, QIAGEN product page https://www.qiagen.com/us/products/qiaprep-spin-miniprep-kit
